title: Error for partly out-of-bounds part selections
body:
### Version

yosys -0.15

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Consider the following test case:
module top(x, y);
  input [2:0] x;
  output [3:0] y;
  localparam [5:15] p = 51681708;
  assign y = p[15 + x -: 5];
endmodule

and the following command

yosys -p 'read_verilog rtl.v; synth; write_verilog syn.v'



### Expected Behavior

This is expected to set y[3]=1 for a=1

### Actual Behavior

but the yosys  synthesis output sets y[3]=0
